nasb.text: And in those days men will seek death and will not find it; they will long to die, and death flees from them.

esv.text: And in those days people will seek death and will not find it. They will long to die, but death will flee from them.

cnv.text: 在那些日子，人要求死，卻決不得死；切願要死，死卻遠離他們。

ccb.text: 那时候，人求死，却求不到；想死，死却躲避他们。

csbs.text: 在那些日子里，人们将会求死，却绝不得死；他们渴望死，死却逃避他们。
